title.en: Biological evaluation of medical devices - Part 1: Evaluation and testing within a risk management process

scope.en: Framework for biological evaluation of medical devices within risk management

standards.abstract: Specifies general principles governing the biological evaluation of medical devices within a risk management process.

title.en: Biological evaluation of medical devices - Part 3: Tests for genotoxicity, carcinogenicity and reproductive toxicity

scope.en: Genotoxicity, carcinogenicity and reproductive toxicity testing

standards.abstract: Specifies categories of tests for genotoxicity, carcinogenicity and reproductive toxicity for evaluating potential genetic and reproductive hazards.

title.en: Biological evaluation of medical devices - Part 5: Tests for in vitro cytotoxicity

standards.abstract: Describes test methods for assessing in vitro cytotoxicity of medical devices, their materials and/or extracts.

title.en: Biological evaluation of medical devices - Part 7: Ethylene oxide sterilization residuals

scope.en: Allowable limits for EO residuals in EO-sterilised medical devices

standards.abstract: Specifies procedures for determining allowable limits for residual ethylene oxide (EO) and ethylene chlorohydrin (ECH) in sterilized medical devices.

title.en: Biological evaluation of medical devices - Part 11: Tests for systemic toxicity

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for assessing the potential of medical devices and their constituent materials to cause systemic toxicity.

title.en: Medical devices utilizing animal tissues and their derivatives - Part 1: Application of risk management

scope.en: Risk management for medical devices utilizing animal tissues

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for risk management aspects of medical devices utilizing animal tissues and their derivatives.

title.en: Medical devices utilizing animal tissues and their derivatives - Part 2: Controls on sourcing, collection and handling

scope.en: Controls on sourcing, collection and handling of animal tissues

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for controls on sourcing, collection and handling of animal tissues used in medical devices.

title.en: Medical devices utilizing animal tissues and their derivatives - Part 3: Validation of the elimination and/or inactivation of viruses and transmissible spongiform encephalopathy (TSE) agents

scope.en: Virus/TSE agent elimination validation for animal-derived medical devices

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for validation of the elimination and/or inactivation of viruses and TSE agents in medical devices utilizing animal tissues.

title.en: Biological evaluation of medical devices — Part 1: Evaluation and testing within a risk management process

standards.abstract: Specifies the general principles governing biological evaluation of medical devices within a risk management process. Guides the selection of appropriate evaluation methods.

title.en: Biological evaluation of medical devices - Part 4: Selection of tests for interactions with blood

standards.abstract: Specifies categories of tests for evaluating the effects of medical device contact with blood.
standards.scope: Biological evaluation of medical devices -- Selection of tests for interactions with blood.

title.en: Biological evaluation of medical devices - Part 6: Tests for local effects after implantation

standards.abstract: Specifies test methods for evaluating local effects after implantation of biomaterials and medical devices.
standards.scope: Biological evaluation of medical devices -- Tests for local effects after implantation.

title.en: Biological evaluation of medical devices - Part 9: Framework for identification and quantification of potential degradation products

standards.abstract: Provides a framework for identification and quantification of potential degradation products from medical devices.
standards.scope: Biological evaluation of medical devices -- Framework for identification and quantification of potential degradation products.

title.en: Biological evaluation of medical devices - Part 10: Tests for skin sensitization

standards.abstract: Specifies procedures for assessing skin sensitization (delayed-type hypersensitivity) caused by medical devices.
standards.scope: Biological evaluation of medical devices -- Tests for skin sensitization.

title.en: Biological evaluation of medical devices - Part 13: Identification and quantification of degradation products from polymeric medical devices

standards.abstract: Specifies general requirements for identification and quantification of degradation products from polymeric medical devices.
standards.scope: Biological evaluation of medical devices -- Identification and quantification of degradation products from polymeric medical devices.

title.en: Biological evaluation of medical devices - Part 14: Identification and quantification of degradation products from ceramics

standards.abstract: Specifies general requirements for identification and quantification of degradation products from ceramics used in medical devices.
standards.scope: Biological evaluation of medical devices -- Identification and quantification of degradation products from ceramics.

title.en: Biological evaluation of medical devices - Part 15: Identification and quantification of degradation products from metals and alloys

standards.abstract: Specifies general requirements for identification and quantification of degradation products from metals and alloys used in medical devices.
standards.scope: Biological evaluation of medical devices -- Identification and quantification of degradation products from metals and alloys.

title.en: Biological evaluation of medical devices - Part 16: Toxicokinetic study design for degradation products and leachables

standards.abstract: Specifies principles for designing toxicokinetic studies to assess the potential hazards of degradation products from medical devices.
standards.scope: Biological evaluation of medical devices -- Toxicokinetic study design for degradation products and leachables.

title.en: Biological evaluation of medical devices - Part 2: Animal welfare requirements

standards.scope: Animal welfare requirements for biological evaluation.
standards.abstract: Requirements and guidance on animal protection aspects of animal tests for biological evaluation of medical devices.

title.en: Biological evaluation of medical devices - Part 8: Selection and qualification of reference materials for biological tests

standards.abstract: Guidance for selection and qualification of reference materials used in biological testing of medical devices.

title.en: Biological evaluation of medical devices - Part 19: Physico-chemical, morphological and topographical characterization of materials

standards.abstract: Provides guidance on physico-chemical, morphological and topographical characterization of materials used in medical devices.

title.en: Biological evaluation of medical devices - Part 20: Principles and methods for immunotoxicology testing of medical devices

standards.abstract: Describes principles and methods for immunotoxicology testing of medical devices.

title.en: Biological evaluation of medical devices - Part 21: Experimental assessment of irritation potential in skin sensitization assays

standards.scope: Irritation assessment in skin sensitization assays.
standards.abstract: Provides guidance on experimental assessment of irritation potential in skin sensitization assays.

title.en: Biological evaluation of medical devices - Part 22: Guidance on nanomaterials

standards.abstract: Provides guidance on biological evaluation of nanomaterials in medical devices.
